title: the_better_allay_wind_charge_allay
description:
These is a new allay named bamboo allay. This mod was made using MCreator.
 Please subscribe me on Bilibili.
body:
——Unless there is a vicious BUG,Otherwise, it will not be updated (if there is a BUG,Please chat with the author in the private message interface of Bilibili).

Can you subscribe me on Bilibili? https://space.bilibili.com/417059009?spm_id_from=333.337.0.0

Questions about the use of mod content: I don't know the specifics of the protocol, so feel free to use the mod models in the case of non-commercial, tagging my name, and of course, I treat them as my children, and I don't want you to hurt them.

This mod adds a creature:wind charge allay.

When you place 4 diamonds, 4 breeze rods, and a jukebox on your crafting table, you will synthesize its creatures' item forms and gain progress [wind charge allay! Elves from trial chambers!] (Parent: Find a Good Friend in Farming), after release, if your mode is not Creative mode, the wind charge allay in item form will enter a cooldown of 600 ticks (30 seconds).

If you kill her, you will suffer Heavenly Punishment (Lightning Struck while gaining a long heavy fall).

When right-clicking on her, causes other mobs to re-smash once, but each re-smash has a cooldown of 15 seconds.
